# awscc_sagemaker_algorithm (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::SageMaker::Algorithm



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `algorithm_name` (String) The name of the algorithm.
- `training_specification` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--training_specification))

### Optional

- `algorithm_description` (String) A description of the algorithm.
- `certify_for_marketplace` (Boolean) Whether to certify the algorithm so that it can be listed in AWS Marketplace.
- `inference_specification` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--inference_specification))
- `tags` (Attributes List) An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `algorithm_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the algorithm.
- `creation_time` (String) A timestamp specifying when the algorithm was created.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

- `training_image` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_sagemaker_algorithm.example
  identity = {
    algorithm_arn = "algorithm_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `algorithm_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the algorithm

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_sagemaker_algorithm.example
  id = "algorithm_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_sagemaker_algorithm.example "algorithm_arn"
```
